meaning: n.计算,帐目,说明,估计,理由;vi.说明,总计有,认为,得分;vt.认为
examples: I don't have a bank account.
Does your current account pay interest?
This purchase will account for 39.5% of the outstanding shares of the brokerage following the issuance.
Spouse heirs, of course, can still claim the account as their own and name new heirs.
